mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routine (member_seq_no, title, target_value, routine_type, interval_weeks, days_of_week, start_ymd) VALUES(#{memberSeqNo}, #{title}, #{targetValue}, #{routineType}, #{intervalWeeks}, #{daysOfWeek}, #{startYmd})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM routine WHERE member_seq_no = #{memberSeqNo} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
